import './ServicesScreen.css' import React, {useState} from "react"; import {Button} from "../../components/Buttons"; import RightProcessElement from "../../components/RightProcessElement/RightProcessElement"; import LeftProcessElement from "../../components/LeftProcessElement/LeftProcessElement"; import FaqElement from "../../components/FaqElement/FaqElement"; function ServicesScreen() { const [faqs, setfaqs] = useState([ { question: 'What does your guarantee include?', answer: 'good', open: true }, { question: 'Is the inspection free?', answer: 'bad', open: false }, { question: 'Are your technicians trained and certified?', answer: 'meh', open: false }, { question: 'What other services besides pest control do you offer?', answer: 'meh', open: false } ]) return(

Impact Pest Pros

Pest Control

A process you can trust

Rodent Control Starting As Low As $70/mo.**

Rodents are swarming nationwide and your home needs protection. Luckily our rodent protection service starts as low as $70/mo. Click below to schedule your FREE inspection and ensure your area is protected from insects.

{faqs.map((faq, i) => (
))}
); } export default ServicesScreen;
